HGSS.644.0001:
Huh? I can’t hear you very well.
We must have a bad connection.\f
Try calling again from somewhere else!
HGSS.644.0002:
Hello...
What’s going on?\r
I’m doing great.\f
HGSS.644.0003:
There are stronger Gym Leaders than
me out there. They’re all waiting to\r
cheer you on!
HGSS.644.0004:
That’s right... If we were to have
another battle, then we’d need to do it\r
when I’m free, like on Tuesday nights.\f
Give me a call then.
HGSS.644.0005:
I’m competely free today.
Why don’t we have a battle? [0200,0000]
HGSS.644.0006:
All right!\f
Do you know where the Fighting Dojo is
in Saffron City? I’ll be waiting there.
HGSS.644.0007:
I see...
Well, you’ve got your own plans as well,\r
I understand.
HGSS.644.0008:
Hey! Before you battle me again, don’t
you have someone else you promised to\r
battle with?
HGSS.644.0009:
I’ll be at the Fighting Dojo in Saffron
City. Get ready and meet me there!
HGSS.644.0010:
This is Morty!
How are you doing?\f
HGSS.644.0011:
Hey, didn’t we make plans to meet at
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City?\r
I remembered!\r
You didn’t forget, did you?
HGSS.644.0012:
The legendary Pokémon: Suicune, Entei,
and Raikou--which do you like best?\f
Unlike Eusine, I don’t really have any
interest in Suicune.\f
So I’d have to say Entei...
But I can’t leave out Raikou...\r
Hmm... Guess I can’t make up my mind.
HGSS.644.0013:
You know, I once saw Entei. I mean like
up close. It was amazing.\f
Entei looked me in the eyes. I’ll never
forget its eyes.\f
It was like it could see right through
me, down into the depths of my heart...
HGSS.644.0014:
How have you been?
Anything interesting happening?\f
I’m doing the same as usual, just my
regular Gym Leader duties.\f
There haven’t been any really strong
Trainers here since you came through.\f
Seems like you’re one of those genius
Trainers you seldom meet.\f
Ha ha ha! I don’t mean to flatter you!
